title: Sample menu for babies 6–12 months
excerpt: Family foods, texture progression, and a sample day at around 8 months — continue breast milk alongside solids.
content:
## Principles

- Breast milk on demand; solids complement, not replace, milk before 12 months.
- Increase texture from purée to soft pieces.
- No added salt, sugar, or honey.

## Sample day (about 8 months)

- Morning: breast milk; rice porridge with mashed pumpkin.
- Midday: soft rice, flaked steamed fish, mashed avocado.
- Afternoon: breast milk; ripe banana pieces.
- Evening: minced chicken congee (cháo gà); breast milk before sleep.

## Notes

Introduce allergens one at a time; supervise eating; avoid choking hazards.
